title: Replace placeholder compatibility signatures and demo signing paths with canonical policy verifier

verification_steps.name: rch_cargo_check_extended_surfaces_default
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extcompat cargo check -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --tests --message-format short
verification_steps.detail: Worker hit exit=137 after reaching frankenengine-node; treated as remote resource pressure, not a Rust diagnostic.

verification_steps.name: rch_cargo_check_extended_surfaces_lowmem
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS='-Cdebuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extcompat_lowmem cargo check -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --tests --message-format short
verification_steps.detail: Feature-gated policy surfaces compiled successfully on a constrained worker.

verification_steps.name: rch_compat_gates_unit_tests
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extcompat_tests cargo test -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --lib compat_gates::tests -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: 79 passed, 0 failed. Adversarial forged-input, stale-receipt, scope-widening, shortcut-regression, and cached-p99 coverage all passed.

verification_steps.name: rch_fmt_check_package
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_fmt cargo fmt --check -p frankenengine-node
verification_steps.detail: Formatting diffs are currently present in unrelated files under active work (notably api/session_auth.rs and connector/control_channel.rs), so package-level fmt is not a bd-2ek7-specific signal.

verification_steps.name: rch_compatibility_gate_unit_tests
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS='-Cdebuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extcompat_lowmem cargo test -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --lib compatibility_gate::tests -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: 33 passed, 0 failed after correcting the scope-widening test fixture to re-sign the enclosing scope receipt.

verification_steps.name: rch_integration_compatibility_policy_pipeline
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS='-Cdebuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extcompat_lowmem cargo test -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --test compatibility_policy_pipeline -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: Added a minimal cargo-visible wrapper at crates/franken-node/tests/compatibility_policy_pipeline.rs; rerun passed 2 tests, 0 failures.

verification_steps.name: rch_clippy_package_all_targets
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS='-Cdebuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extclippy cargo clippy -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --all-targets -- -D warnings
verification_steps.detail: Remote lane surfaced an unrelated pre-existing lint in crates/franken-node/src/verifier_economy/mod.rs:1084 (clippy::too_many_arguments in a test helper) before the worker exited.

verification_steps.name: rch_clippy_package_lib_extended_surfaces
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS='-Cdebuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/rch_target_crimsonglacier_extclippy_lib cargo clippy -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces --lib -- -D warnings
verification_steps.detail: Feature-gated library surface containing compat_gates and compatibility_gate passed clippy with -D warnings.

notes: The relevant policy modules are only compiled when feature extended-surfaces is enabled.
Package-level fmt and all-targets clippy remain noisy because the repository currently has unrelated active-worktree edits outside bd-2ek7 surfaces.
Bead-local implementation, unit coverage, integration coverage, and library-surface linting are complete.
